sutta: the buddha monks it is hard to find 1 gone forth when all endowed with 5 qualities what 5 monks it is hard to find 1 subtle minded gone forth when old hard to find 1 proper in department very learned a preacher of dhamma it is hard to find 1 who has the vinaya or discipline by heart monks it is hard to find 1 gone forth when old endowed with these 5 qualities that's the end of the sutta
commentary: you hear the buddha is saying when a person goes renounces and goes forth in his old age it's difficult to to find him as a good monk because these various qualities are difficult for him to have just 1 to have to be subtle minded uh the second 1 to be proper in department to carry himself well third 1 learn it learn it in the discourses of the buddha fought 1 a preacher of dhamma then the last 1 who knows the vinaya the disciplinary code by heart so as i mentioned before when we i mean a person is old and renounces you know it's very difficult for him to adjust to the new lifestyle and also when we are old we become weak physically and mentally that's why the the first thing here the buddha said difficult to find 1 subtle minded with a strong mind with a capable mind on the next 1 in
